changes.change: Added BANNED PATTERNS section with 5 anti-patterns (exponential spawning, fixed solutions, infinite safe states, success-spawns-targets, statistical unlosability) + self-check calculator
changes.reason: puzzler reproduced run-004 exponential overflow anti-pattern (Signal Lock)

changes.change: Added MANDATORY DEVIL PRE-CHECK with 5 exploit tests + required devil_precheck output field
changes.reason: visionary had 0/2 pass rate, double-vetoed Liar's Manual was statistically unloseable

changes.change: Added Run-008 Bug Patterns (items 12-16): SVG width/height, hitArea local coords, closure capture, deterministic RNG, shutdown() method
changes.reason: All 4 MAJOR bugs were documented patterns that developer re-discovered

changes.change: Genre-adjusted validation thresholds: reflex 72, brain 68, creative 65. Top-N fallback minimum 60.
changes.reason: Only 2/10 brain ideas passed 72 threshold — genre structurally scores lower

changes.change: Added '30-Second Death Test Proof' mandatory section with calculation template
changes.reason: Bureaucrat Panic shipped with 36s idle death (3×12s), needed 9s timer reduction

changes.change: Added Agent Self-Report Protocol — all agents must include ## Self-Report at end of output. Phase 9.0 collects and indexes reports. Phase 9.1 uses reports as primary input for meta-leader review.
changes.reason: User requested agents write their own retrospective reports for future runs

deferred.reason: Good idea but needs implementation — defer to next run
